text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm relaxing in my room on a day off. I'm about to
eat breakfast, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
choice_data_list: (I've got a bad feeling about this!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for everything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me so much since we first met!
Like... um... so many new things!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, my divinations are now a thousand
percent accurate! And my running has only gotten
better too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The goddess of victory isn't just on my side, she's
this close to being my best friend too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you and the great Shiraoki! I give
thanks! Oh, how grateful I am!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, I bid you adieu! I have expressed my
innermost feelings, compelled to do so as I was in
my dreams. Time to go home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite grasp what she's saying... but I think
she's satisfied with my guidance so far!
